reason: Enabling certmap in SSSD is a standard STIG hardening measure for certificate-based authentication. It involves a simple configuration edit in /etc/sssd/sssd.conf and follows auth/ssh/sudo/pam change patterns that are safe to remediate, with low risk of lockout or system breakage when applied correctly.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Potential authentication issues if certmap configuration is incorrect
